name: chat-domain-structure
description: chatDomain (ai-sdk-chat schema) provides ChatSession, ChatMessage, CreatedArtifact entities with MST enhancements. Actions: createChatSession, addMessage, recordArtifact. Views: messageCount, latestMessage, artifactCount. findBySession() queries.
relevantCode: chatDomain = domain({ name: 'ai-sdk-chat', from: ChatDomain, enhancements: {...} })
recommendation: Can link ChatSession to FeatureSession via naming convention or extend chatDomain to add featureSessionId field.
